footer.desc: Center of excellence in neurofeedback in Morocco. 100% natural brain training for your well-being.
footer.address: No. 12 2nd floor, Living office Building, 362 BD Ghandi Oasis, Casablanca

home.heroDesc: Natural brain training for deep sleep, absolute concentration, and a peaceful mind.
home.whatisDesc: Discover how this passive brain training method utilizes the natural plasticity of the nervous system.
home.processDesc: Neurofeedback is a non-invasive method that allows your brain to learn to function better, naturally.
home.step1Desc: During a session, you are comfortably seated. Non-invasive sensors measure your brain's electrical activity in real time.
home.step2Desc: You watch a movie or listen to music. The audio and visual outputs adapt instantly based on your brain activity, creating a natural feedback loop.
home.step3Desc: Your brain learns to optimize itself. Session after session, new neural pathways form for long-lasting well-being.

reviewsList.name: Dr. Amine T.
reviewsList.text: An exceptional ally for my patients

home.programsDesc: Discover how brain training addresses the precise neurological needs of each profile.
home.progParentsText: Does your child face attention challenges (ADHD), school anxiety, or autism? If you've tried traditional solutions and are looking for a natural alternative, NeurOptimal® neurofeedback gently trains the brain to self-regulate, addressing the root cause of cerebral dysregulation.
home.progParentsStatText: Observed clinical impact: 85% significant improvement in child behavior and attention in school environments.
progParentsBullets: Proven improvement in concentration, memory, and emotional regulation.
Long-lasting results and enhanced daily independence.
home.progTraumaText: Repeated emotional shocks, post-traumatic stress (PTSD), and traumatic brain injuries (TBI) keep your nervous system on constant alert, causing insomnia and hypervigilance. Neurofeedback retrains your brain to escape 'survival mode' to find calm, control, and resilience.
home.progTraumaStatText: Observed clinical impact: 91% of supported individuals report a major reduction in hypervigilance and stress symptoms.
progTraumaBullets: Significant decrease in nightmares and calming of hypervigilance.
Natural restoration of deep and restful sleep.
Reclaiming emotional control and finding inner peace.
home.progPerformersText: Whether you are a CEO, top-level entrepreneur, or athlete, your daily life requires surgical mental clarity. Neurofeedback is the ultimate brain optimization tool — the same one used by special forces and Olympic athletes to gain a decisive competitive edge.
home.progPerformersStatText: Observed clinical impact: +45% focus duration without signs of fatigue or cognitive decline.
progPerformersBullets: Ultra-precise focus and absolute mental clarity under high pressure.
Improved nervous resilience and optimal stress management.
Faster and more effective strategic decision-making.
home.progAdultsText: Do you feel stuck in an endless cycle of chronic anxiety, depression, or nervous exhaustion from burnout? Neurofeedback offers a gentle method to break this vicious cycle by helping your nervous system restore its balance and natural internal peace.
home.progAdultsStatText: Observed clinical impact: 83% reduction in panic attacks and mental load after 8 sessions.
progAdultsBullets: Gradual liberation from latent anxiety and panic attacks.
Safe, natural reduction of reliance on mental fatigue.
Restored sleep quality and better nervous vitality.
home.visionTitle: A vision born from deep conviction
home.visionText: Dr. Chadia Chakib founded INFC with one conviction: every brain has the ability to self-regulate. Trained in the most rigorous NeurOptimal® protocols, she built the first network of premium neurofeedback centers in Morocco.

visionTimeline.text: First international training in neurofeedback — NeurOptimal® certified.
Opening of the first clinic in Casablanca — Twin Center.
National expansion: 4 centers in Casablanca, Marrakech, Kenitra, and Tangier.
+500 patients supported, active medical partnerships, and practitioner training program.

problemsList.desc: Emotional sequels, hypervigilance, and post-traumatic stress after shock.

problemsList.desc: Optimization of mental clarity, decision making, and resilience under pressure.

problemsList.title: Mood & Balance
problemsList.desc: Low mood, mood swings, and emotional instability affecting daily life.

home.medicalDesc: Clinical evidence, scientific publications, and meta-analyses validating the neuro-sensory regulation approach.
home.medicalFormDesc: Are you a clinician, physician, or healthcare professional? Access our complete scientific database, receive clinical files of our patients in Morocco, and schedule a scientific information meeting with our certified practitioners.
medicalFormBullets: Exclusive invitation to our regular round tables and clinical presentations.
Direct referral protocols for your complex patients.
home.medicalFormObjectiveMeeting: Schedule a 15-minute clinical presentation (In-person or Videoconference)
home.medicalSuccess: ✓ Your request has been successfully registered. Our teams will contact you within 24 hours with the complete documentation.

medicalArticles.title: Pediatrics & ADHD
medicalArticles.desc: Clinical meta-analysis demonstrating sustainable reduction of inattention and motor hyperactivity in children through neurofeedback training compared to conventional pharmacological approaches.

medicalArticles.title: Traumatic Brain Injuries (TBI) & PTSD
medicalArticles.desc: Published clinical study showing major improvements in falling asleep, pain management, and nightmare attenuation in veterans suffering from PTSD and mild traumatic brain injury.

medicalArticles.title: Neuroplasticity & Deep Sleep
medicalArticles.desc: Explanatory scientific dossier on how NeurOptimal® signal micro-interruptions stimulate intrinsic brain neuroplasticity by promoting delta and theta waves essential for regulatory rest.

science.heroDesc: Discover the science behind NeurOptimal® dynamic neurofeedback. A natural, non-invasive approach to brain regulation, validated by decades of neuroscientific research.
science.loopTitle: How does the regulation loop work?
science.loopDesc: This is not an active medical therapy. It is a real-time mirror that allows your brain to self-correct.
